form.formComment: Eye-catching performance tracking the speed and going on to score by a nose in a Other last start at this track, clocking a solid 34.33 over the 595m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd on March 12 over 530m at this track behind Cawbourne Adele beaten 0.8 lengths (30.66) in a Grade 5. Strong form emerging from the last run. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th over 512m at Mt Gambier beaten 5.5 lengths (29.86) behind Gorringe in a OPEN on March 29. Placed two back at this track. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (31.57) when fourth over 530m at this track in a Special conditions race. Goes very well off the draw boasting two wins and two places from five starts. Tough field and looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked twice turn into back straight.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance showing plenty of speed to score by 1.75 lengths in a OPEN last start at this track, clocking a dazzling 30.19 over the 530m trip. Harder here but will be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by 2.25 lengths in a OPEN at this track and clocking a dazzling 30.14 over the 530m trip. Rates a top chance if runs up to time two back.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 8 lengths over 530m at this track in a handy (30.23), beating Woodside Frankie. Will find this a bit tougher, looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.51) at this track in a OPEN, finishing fourth and beaten 4.5 lengths. Has five successes and nine minors from 21 starts from box 8. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Won his last three in a row including a strong win last start racing on the pace over 512m at Mt Gambier by 1.3 lengths in a OPEN. Flying lately and can score again.
